markers: src/app/page.tsx contains the primary study UI, including embedded flashcards, question sets, progress metrics, and topic tabs.
public/logo.svg is the only standalone image asset found in the inspected source tree.
No dedicated lecture, algorithm, or tutorial data directory was found; relevant educational content is inline in application code.
summary: This project is mostly a Next.js study dashboard with hard-coded board-review content and AI-generated questions, not a separate content corpus. The only clear migratable educational assets are the inline study/question blocks in `src/app/page.tsx`, the question-generation API route, and the branding image.

algorithms.reason: Contains the study card flows, category logic, and question/answer content used by the app.
Generates algorithm-like board-review questions from category/type input.

lectures.reason: No standalone lecture files were found; any lecture-like educational material is embedded in the app page.

images.reason: Only standalone image asset discovered in the source project.

tutorials.reason: Contains flashcards, topic sections, and learning tabs that function as tutorial content.
Supports tutorial-style question generation for the study flow.

dependencies: React client state and inline scripting in `src/app/page.tsx`
recommendation: Treat this as an inline-content migration candidate, not a corpus import. If you proceed, first extract the hard-coded study content from `src/app/page.tsx` into structured content files; otherwise there is very little standalone educational payload to migrate.
